title: Kaguya-sama: Love Is War
sourceNotes: Cumulative episodes across S1 (12) + S2 (12) + S3 Ultra Romantic (13). Episodes are mostly self-contained chapter adaptations; arc boundaries follow major story shifts in the manga. Chapter ranges approximate.
